title: Removable stent
abstract: Disclosed is a removable coiled stent comprising a first end, a conduit section, and a second end comprising a retrieval feature, where the coiled stent is configured to be placed within an interior volume of a vessel and exert a radial force upon a wall of the vessel.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A medical device comprising: a coiled stent comprising a first end, a conduit section, and a second end, wherein the second end comprises a retrieval feature, wherein the coiled stent is substantially cylindrical in shape and is configured to be placed within an interior volume of a vessel and exert a radial force upon a wall of the vessel, and wherein the coiled stent is configured to be removed from the vessel. 2. The medical device of claim 1, wherein the retrieval feature comprises a hook that extends from the second end of the coiled stent. 3. The medical device of claim 1, wherein the retrieval feature comprises a loop that extends from the second end of the coiled stent. 4. The medical device of claim 1, wherein an outer diameter of the coiled stent is substantially equivalent to an inner diameter of the vessel. 5. The medical device of claim 1, wherein the coiled stent is configured to expand from a first diameter to a second diameter, wherein the first diameter is smaller than the second diameter, and the second diameter is substantially equivalent to an inner diameter of the vessel. 6. The medical device of claim 1, wherein the coiled stent is configured to support the vessel and maintain a minimal diameter of the vessel. 7. The medical device of claim 1, wherein the coiled stent comprises a metal alloy. 8. The medical device of claim 7, wherein the coiled stent comprises stainless steel, a cobalt chrome alloy, a nickel aluminum alloy, or a nickel titanium alloy. 9. The medical device of claim 7, wherein the metal alloy is coated with a polymer. 10. The medical device of claim 1, wherein the coiled stent is resistant to tissue incorporation. 11. The medical device of claim 1, wherein stent has a circular cross section. 12. The medical device of claim 1, wherein stent has a non-circular cross section. 13. The medical device of claim 1, wherein the vessel comprises at least one of a duct, a canal, a stricture, or other biological passage. 14. A method for expanding or fortifying a vessel, comprising surgically placing the medical device of any one of claims 1-13 in the vessel. 15. The method of claim 14, further comprising expanding the medical device using a balloon after the medical device is placed in the vessel. 16. The method of claim 14, wherein the medical device is configured to expand after being placed in the vessel. 17. The method of claim 14, wherein the medical device is placed endoscopically. 18. The method of claim 14, wherein the medical device is placed percutaneously. 19. The method of claim 14, further comprising removing the medical device from the vessel. 20. The method of claim 19, wherein removing the medical device comprises: attaching an implement configured to mate with the retrieval feature of the medical device to the medical device; and pulling the medical device from the vessel. 21. A removal device comprising: 

 a metal-tipped sheath; and an implement configured to move through the metal-tipped sheath and attach to the retrieval feature of the medical device of any one of claims 1-13. 22. A kit comprising the medical device of any one of claims 1-13 and a removal device comprising a metal-tipped sheath and an implement configured to move through the metal- tipped sheath and attach to the retrieval feature of the medical device.
